content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於6月3日00:45進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年6月17日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
一、戰鬥
【喚醒體：卡斯托爾強化】
● 天賦：「聖羽洗罪」首次打出黑羽施加的侵蝕量由 420％ 攻擊力提高至 840％ 攻擊力，且額外獲得 10 點狂氣。施加「侵蝕」後本回合自身傷害提高由 10％ 施加量降低至 5％ 施加量，實際由於「侵蝕」量均提高了 100%，這裏傷害提高量未發生變化。
● 靈知覺醒：打出黑羽施加的侵蝕量由 140％ 攻擊力提高至 280％ 攻擊力，保留的護盾提高量由 25% 提高為 50%。
● 超限爆發：新增效果：本回合「黑羽」保留的護盾提高卡斯托爾防禦力的 10%。打出黑羽施加的「侵蝕」由 70％ 攻擊力提高至 140％ 攻擊力。
● 靈塑適性：「聖羽洗罪」施加的「侵蝕」增幅由 100％~200％攻擊力 提高至 200％~400％攻擊力。
 
二、優化和問題修復
● 修復了喚醒體「卡斯托爾」的「維度影像」未能在探索中正確掉落的問題。
● 修復了喚醒體「卡斯托爾」的技能在能夠觸發「超距」效果時缺少閃爍提示的問題。
● 修復了喚醒體「卡斯托爾」施加的「侵蝕」無視怪物「豐穰母樹」傷害免疫效果的問題。
● 修復了打出「通曉萬物之理」復製的卡牌觸發「失聲唱機」後，洗入的「通曉萬物之理」卡面描述依然是「通曉萬物之理」變化後卡牌的問題。
● 降低了「卡斯托爾」試玩關卡的怪物傷害和生命。
● 修復了「相位對弈」中戰後統計界面喚醒體「卡斯托爾」的頭像丟失的問題。
● 修復了通訊器聊天中喚醒體「卡斯托爾」簽名缺失的問題。
● 修復了喚醒體「卡斯托爾」語音中關於其他喚醒體閑話的解鎖條件。
● 修復了「鏡像囚徒」中「求知的願望」商店提前解鎖的問題
● 優化了「相位對弈」中「強效」的文本描述，使其更加準確。
● 優化了語言設置為英語時的以下文本表述問題：
    ○ 優化了【1.5周年特別活動：窺覷神國的陰影】活動劇情：統一了世界觀相關術語，修改了一些不自然的措辭，統一了旁白時態。完整的人工翻譯將隨劇情整體優化進度提供。
    ○ 優化了相位對弈界面關於購買進階課題解鎖卡牌的UI文本。
    ○ 修復了喚醒體「卡斯托爾」的異夢劇情中角色卡納克的角色名不一致問題。
    ○ 跟隨喚醒體「卡斯托爾」的技能強化、「相位對弈」中「強效」的文本描述、喚醒體「卡斯托爾」語音中關於其他喚醒體閑話的解鎖條件補充，更新了相關文本的英語翻譯。

V2.2.2.4 Online Maintenance Notice
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on June 4 at 00:45(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on June 17 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
[Awakener Castor Buffs]
● Talent: 
"Cleansing Feathers": When "Onyx Plume" is played for the first time, the amount of Corrosion inflicted is increased from 420% ATK to 840% ATK, and it now additionally grants Castor 10 Aliemus. 
After inflicting Corrosion, Castor's DMG Boost for this turn is reduced from 10% to 5% of of the amount of Corrosion applied. However, since the amount of Corrosion inflicted has been increased by 100%, the actual DMG Boost Castor receives remains unchanged.
● Rouse: 
The Corrosion inflicted by "Onyx Plume" is increased from 140% ATK to 280% ATK, and the Shield retained is increased from 25% to 50%.
● Over-Exaltation: 
New Effect: This turn, the Shield retained by "Onyx Plume" is increased by 10% of Castor's DEF. The Corrosion inflicted by "Onyx Plume" increases from 70% ATK to 140% ATK.
● Soulforge Aptitude: 
The "Corrosion" stacks boost provided by "Cleansing Feathers" is increased from 100％~200％ ATK to 200％~400％ ATK.

[Bug Fixes]
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Castor"'s "Dimensional Image" was not dropping correctly during exploration.
● Fixed an issue where there was no blink hint for the Awakener "Castor"'s Skill when it could trigger the "Quasar" effect.
● Fixed an issue where the "Corrosion" applied by the Awakener "Castor" ignored the damage immunity of the monster "The mother tree".
● Fixed an issue where after playing a copied card from "Master of Omniscient Verity", the description of the shuffled "Master of Omniscient Verity" card remained as the post-changed version of "Master of Omniscient Verity."
● Reduced the monster DMG and HP in the Awakener "Castor" Demo Stage.
● Fixed an issue where the avatar of the Awakener "Castor" was missing in the post-battle statistics interface in "Traphase."
● Fixed an issue where the signature of the Awakener "Castor" was missing in Communicator chat.
● Fixed an issue with the unlock conditions for idle chats about other Awakeners in the Awakener "Castor" Voice lines.
● Fixed an issue where the "Desire for Knowledge" Store in "Mirrored Prisoner" unlocked prematurely.
● Optimized the text description of "Amplification" in "Traphase" to make it more accurate.
● Localization Fixes and Improvements (English Language Setting):
    ○ Optimized the story of [1.5th Anniversary Special Event: Glimpse Beyond Sanctum]: Unified world-building terminology, revised some unnatural phrasing and tense issues. Full proofreading will be provided in the future.
    ○ Optimized the UI text in the Traphase interface regarding unlocking cards through Premium Topics.
    ○ Repaired an inconsistency in the character name of Karnahk in Awakener Castor's event story.
    ○ Updated the English translations related to the following texts updated in this patch:
        ■ New skill descriptions for Awakener Castor following his buff.
        ■ New text description for "Amplification" in Traphase.
■ New unlock conditions for Castor's voicelines about other Awakeners.
